name: project-aajia
description: Google Docs-style document editor. Phase 1: document creation and editing.

scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @aajia/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @aajia/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
